description_long: This lamppost features a robust, angular wooden post with a slightly irregular vertical profile, anchored securely into a square concrete base. Extending horizontally from the top of the post is a thick wooden arm, reinforced by a diagonal support strut, both fastened with prominent metal bolts. Suspended from the end of the arm is a single lantern-style lamp head, which has a classic, slightly tapered hexagonal shape and a dark metal frame enclosing a frosted glass or plastic diffuser. The overall design is rustic and utilitarian, evoking a traditional or park-like aesthetic suitable for outdoor urban or suburban environments. The wood appears stained in a deep brown, while the base is a neutral gray, and the lamp head is black with a warm yellow glow. There are no visible decorative embellishments or additional attachments on the structure.
description: A rustic wooden lamppost with a concrete base and a single lantern-style lamp head suspended from a horizontal arm. The design is sturdy, angular, and utilitarian, with visible metal bolts and a warm glowing lamp.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the wooden post and the lantern hanging to the left, with the concrete base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the horizontal arm, the diagonal support strut, and the lantern hanging at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the post and arm, with the lantern mostly hidden and the concrete base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arm, support strut, and lantern, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with a hexagonal, slightly tapered black metal frame and frosted diffuser.
